mapper.select: SELECT u.user_code AS userCode, u.login_id AS loginId, u.user_name AS userName, u.email AS email, g.group_name AS groupName, CASE WHEN NVL(u.owner_yn, 0) = 1 THEN '최고관리자' WHEN NVL(u.admin_yn, 0) = 1 THEN '관리자' ELSE '일반 사용자' END AS roleName, u.profile_image AS profileImage, NVL(u.web_notification_yn, 'N') AS webNotificationYn, NVL(u.email_notification_yn, 'N') AS emailNotificationYn, NVL(u.notification_area, 'all') AS notificationArea FROM users u LEFT JOIN groups g ON u.group_id = g.group_id WHERE u.user_code = #{userCode}

SELECT u.user_code AS userCode, u.user_name AS userName, g.group_name AS groupName, CASE WHEN NVL(u.owner_yn, 0) = 1 THEN '최고관리자' WHEN NVL(u.admin_yn, 0) = 1 THEN '관리자' ELSE '일반 사용자' END AS roleName, u.email AS email, u.profile_image AS profileImage FROM users u LEFT JOIN groups g ON u.group_id = g.group_id WHERE u.user_code = #{userCode}
